mnemonics.title: Harris Formula
mnemonics.content: R = Detector - k*(Trace)² → Remember 'Detective K Trace'

acronyms.usage: Robust model fitting in noisy data

visualTips.visualization: Imagine stacking blurred images like pyramid layers, with each level representing different scales
Picture aligning two sets of feature fingerprints using best pattern matches

analogies.analogy: Like finding distinctive landmarks in a city skyline for navigation
Similar to matching constellation patterns across different star maps
